conversation.content: make game identical to the minecraft

steps.description: Create RemoteEvents and Block folder in ReplicatedStorage for communication and assets
Create the Server Script to handle block logic

payload.Name: VoxelServer
payload.Source:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local PlaceBlockEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PlaceBlockEvent")
local BreakBlockEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("BreakBlockEvent")
local BlocksFolder = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Blocks")

local GRID_SIZE = 4

local function snapToGrid(vector)
	return Vector3.new(
		math.round(vector.X / GRID_SIZE) * GRID_SIZE,
		math.round(vector.Y / GRID_SIZE) * GRID_SIZE,
		math.round(vector.Z / GRID_SIZE) * GRID_SIZE
	)
end

PlaceBlockEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, position, blockName)
	local template = BlocksFolder:FindFirstChild(blockName)
	if not template then return end
	
	-- Basic distance check
	local character = player.Character
	if not character or (character.PrimaryPart.Position - position).Magnitude > 32 then return end

	local newBlock = template:Clone()
	newBlock.Position = snapToGrid(position)
	newBlock.Parent = workspace
	newBlock.Name = "Voxel"
end)

BreakBlockEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, block)
	if block and block.Name == "Voxel" and block:IsA("BasePart") then
		local character = player.Character
		if not character or (character.PrimaryPart.Position - block.Position).Magnitude > 32 then return end
		block:Destroy()
	end
end)

steps.description: Create the Client Script for interaction

payload.Name: VoxelClient
payload.Source:
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local PlaceBlockEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PlaceBlockEvent")
local BreakBlockEvent = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("BreakBlockEvent")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local mouse = player:GetMouse()

local GRID_SIZE = 4
local currentBlockType = "Grass"

-- UI block selection
UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, processed)
	if processed then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.One then currentBlockType = "Grass"
	elseif input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Two then currentBlockType = "Dirt"
	elseif input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Three then currentBlockType = "Stone"
	end
end)

mouse.Button1Down:Connect(function() -- Left click to break
	local target = mouse.Target
	if target and target.Name == "Voxel" then
		BreakBlockEvent:FireServer(target)
	end
end)

mouse.Button2Down:Connect(function() -- Right click to place
	local target = mouse.Target
	if not target then return end
	
	-- Calculate placement position based on surface normal
	local pos = mouse.Hit.p + mouse.TargetSurface.Name == "Top" and Vector3.new(0,2,0) or 
		mouse.TargetSurface.Name == "Bottom" and Vector3.new(0,-2,0) or
		mouse.TargetSurface.Name == "Left" and Vector3.new(-2,0,0) or
		mouse.TargetSurface.Name == "Right" and Vector3.new(2,0,0) or
		mouse.TargetSurface.Name == "Front" and Vector3.new(0,0,-2) or
		Vector3.new(0,0,2)
		
	-- Use normal from raycast for better accuracy
	local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local unitRay = cam:ScreenPointToRay(mouse.X, mouse.Y)
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = {player.Character}
	
	local result = workspace:Raycast(unitRay.Origin, unitRay.Direction * 100, raycastParams)
	if result then
		local placementPos = result.Position + result.Normal * (GRID_SIZE / 2)
		PlaceBlockEvent:FireServer(placementPos, currentBlockType)
	end
end)

Properties.Text: 1: Grass, 2: Dirt, 3: Stone\nL-Click: Break, R-Click: Place
